Name: RGB Levels (32-bit)
Code:
# RGB Levels — 32-bit float precision
mx = _MatrixAuto(c)
c32 = EnsureColorspaceSafe(c, "RGB24", matrix=mx)
c32 = ConvertToPlanarRGB(c32)
c32 = ConvertBits(c32, 32)
r_ex = "x {r_gain} * {r_offset} + 0.0 max 1.0 min 1.0 {r_gamma} / pow 0.5 - {contrast} * 0.5 + {brightness} + 0.0 max 1.0 min 1.0 {gamma} / pow"
g_ex = "x {g_gain} * {g_offset} + 0.0 max 1.0 min 1.0 {g_gamma} / pow 0.5 - {contrast} * 0.5 + {brightness} + 0.0 max 1.0 min 1.0 {gamma} / pow"
b_ex = "x {b_gain} * {b_offset} + 0.0 max 1.0 min 1.0 {b_gamma} / pow 0.5 - {contrast} * 0.5 + {brightness} + 0.0 max 1.0 min 1.0 {gamma} / pow"
c = Expr(c32, r_ex, g_ex, b_ex)

Controls.Description: Red channel gain (multiplier). Increase to warm, decrease to cool
Red channel gamma. Adjusts red midtones independently
Red channel offset (lift). Shifts red black point
Green channel gamma. Adjusts green midtones independently
Green channel offset (lift). Shifts green black point
Blue channel gain (multiplier). Increase for cooler tones
Blue channel gamma. Adjusts blue midtones independently
Blue channel offset (lift). Shifts blue black point
